message:
fix: Complete variable capture handling in variable_usage.zig

Long-term fix: Make collectReferencedVarsInExpr match isNameUsedInExpr
for comprehensive variable capture in try-except blocks.

Added handling for:
- Call keyword_args (f(x=var))
- Call starred/double_starred args (f(*args, **kwargs))
- Subscript slice ranges (arr[start:end:step])

Updated isNameUsedInExpr to also handle slice ranges properly.
